title: Restore CKC story panels and native moodboard integration
operator_request: CKC gained story per character and a moodboard; the old Excalidraw attempt should be replaced by the already-built Handshake notion-style moodboard system.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Reuse current Handshake moodboard/canvas/notion-style primitives; do not revive Excalidraw unless explicitly approved.

scope.summary: Give CKC character sheets linked story and moodboard surfaces using native Handshake primitives.
base_scope: Add or wire story documents per character/sheet version.
Add moodboard links/cards per character using existing native moodboard/canvas primitives.
Keep story, character sheet notes, image notes, and moodboards distinct but cross-linked.
Expose story and moodboard tabs/panels inside CKC when appropriate.
Update internal UserManual with story and moodboard workflows.
acceptance_criteria: A CKC character can open linked story content.
A CKC character can open linked moodboard content through native Handshake primitives.
Story/moodboard refs persist and can be reused by other modules.
Argus can inspect and steer story/moodboard entry points.
verification: Backend/ref tests for story and moodboard links.
Native UI tests for CKC story/moodboard surfaces.
